# task\-phase10\-binary\-distribution\-notes — Document binary distribution notes and artifact naming
status: ready  priority: 3  scope: scope-cli
readiness: waiting  reason: unmet_dependencies
readiness_blockers: task\-phase10\-mcp\-launch\-examples

Clarify how compiled Waystation binaries should be named, stored, copied, and handed to another project or local agent\. Capture the current local distribution convention without accidentally committing ignored executable artifacts\.

## Acceptance
- Docs describe the canonical build command for waystation\.exe\.
- Docs explain that waystation\.exe and local dist packages are ignored unless a release process explicitly decides otherwise\.
- Artifact naming guidance distinguishes latest local builds from versioned release bundles\.
- The existing local skill/package convention is documented without requiring project\-specific paths like DuckBrain\.
- The guidance includes a simple copy/install example for another local project\.
